description: Japanese plucked stringed instrument
description_wiki:
The shamisen or samisen (三味線), also known as sangen (三絃) 
(all meaning 'three strings'), is a three-stringed traditional Japanese musical instrument derived from the Chinese instrument sanxian.

description: county seat of Fresno County, California, United States
description_wiki: Fresno ( ; Spanish for 'ash tree') is a city in the San Joaquin Valley of California, United States.

description: city in and county seat of King County, State of Washington, United States
description_wiki: Seattle (  see-AT-əl) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Washington and the Pacific Northwest region of North America.

description: island country in East Asia
description_wiki: Japan is an island country in East Asia.

description: capital city of Hyogo Prefecture, Japan
description_wiki: Kobe ( KOH-bay; Japanese: 神戸, romanized: Kōbe, pronounced [koꜜː.be] ), officially Kobe City (神戸市, Kōbe-shi; [koː.beꜜ.ɕi]), is the capital city of Hyōgo Prefecture, Japan.

description: capital city of Hiroshima Prefecture, Japan
description_wiki: Hiroshima (広島市, Hiroshima-shi; English: , also UK: , US: , Japanese: [çiɾoɕima] ) is the capital of Hiroshima Prefecture in Japan.

description: shipping company
description_wiki: The Nippon Yusen Kabushiki Kaisha (日本郵船株式会社, Nippon Yūsen kabushiki kaisha; lit. 'Japan Mail Ship Company'), also known as NYK Line, is a Japanese shipping company.

description: largest city in the province of British Columbia, Canada
description_wiki: Vancouver is a major city in Western Canada, located in the Lower Mainland region of British Columbia.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Oregon (  ORR-ih-ghən, -⁠gon) is a state in the Pacific Northwest region of the United States.

description: newspaper in Sacramento, California
description_wiki: The Sacramento Bee is a daily newspaper published in Sacramento, California, in the United States.

description: conflict between the Russian and Japanese empires from 1904 to 1905
description_wiki: The Russo-Japanese War (8 February 1904 – 5 September 1905) was fought between the Russian Empire and the Empire of Japan over rival imperial ambitions in Manchuria and the Korean Empire.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.

description: prefecture of Japan
description_wiki: Kōchi Prefecture (高知県, Kōchi-ken; Japanese pronunciation: [koꜜː.tɕi, koː.tɕi̥ꜜ.keɴ], locally [koː.tɕi]) is a prefecture of Japan located on the island of Shikoku.

description: census-designated place in Fresno County, California, United States
description_wiki: Caruthers () is a census-designated place (CDP) in Fresno County, California, United States.

description: city in Fresno County, California, United States
description_wiki: Parlier is a city in Fresno County, California, United States.

description: severe economic crisis in the USA in the 1930s
description_wiki: In the United States, the Great Depression is commonly (though not universally) dated to the Wall Street crash of October 1929.

description: valley in central California, USA
description_wiki: The Central Valley is a broad, elongated, flat valley that dominates the interior of California, United States.

description: county in California, United States
description_wiki: Fresno County ( ), officially the County of Fresno, is located in the central portion of the U.S. state of California.

description: county in California, United States
description_wiki: Madera County ( ; Madera, Spanish for "Wood"), officially the County of Madera, is a county located at the geographic center of the U.S. state of California.

description: county in California, United States
description_wiki: Kings County is a county located in the U.S. state of California.

description: county in California, United States
description_wiki: Tulare County (  tuu-LAIR-ee) is a county located in the U.S. state of California.

description: 1939–1945 global conflict
description_wiki: World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

description: country in Central Europe
description_wiki: Germany, officially the Federal Republic of Germany, is a country in Western and Central Europe.

description: American multinational banking and financial services corporation
description_wiki: The Bank of America Corporation (Bank of America; often abbreviated BAC or BofA) is an American multinational investment bank and financial services holding company headquartered at the Bank of America Corporate Center in Charlotte, North Carolina, with investment banking and auxiliary headquarters in Manhattan.
